docs.text: JOHN DIFELICE Want to improve your SAT/ACT Scores? Personalized prep is the key to boosting your confidence and your score. I offer tailored strategies for ACT & SAT ✅ Improve your performance in the grammar, vocabulary, and reading comprehension modules ✅ Improve your performance in the math module ✅ Learn tips, tricks, and how to best manage your testing time About Me and my son I am: A retired chemical engineer An enterprise software architect A graduate-level math instructor An experienced STEM instructor An invited instructor for Kaplan GRE Math A published Fiction Author and Manuscript Editor Pricing & Location 1 hour session: $50 I live in Wadsworth, OH and hold sessions at a library or coffee shop If you want me to come to your home, it will require an additional fee Although in-person instruction is best, I can hold remote sessions 📧 Contact Me © 2026 John DiFelice. All rights reserved.
